game.title.description: Name of the Blackjack game card on the home screen.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Blackjack game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Blackjack play button.

chips.display.description: Displays the player's current chip count.

chips.accessibilityLabel.description: Screen reader label for chip count.

bet.label.description: Label above the bet amount input.

bet.decreaseLabel.description: Accessibility label for the decrease bet button (−10).

bet.increaseLabel.description: Accessibility label for the increase bet button (+10).

bet.accessibilityLabel.description: Screen reader label for the current bet stepper value.

actions.deal.description: Button label to deal cards and start a hand.

actions.dealLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Deal button.

actions.hit.description: Button label to take another card.

actions.hitLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Hit button.

actions.stand.description: Button label to end the player's turn.

actions.standLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Stand button.

actions.doubleDown.description: Button label to double the bet and take one card.

actions.doubleDownLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Double Down button when enabled.

actions.doubleDownDisabledLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Double Down button when disabled.

actions.nextHand.description: Button label to start the next hand after result.

actions.nextHandLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Next Hand button.

actions.quit.description: Button label to quit the game and return home.

actions.quitLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Quit button.

hand.player.description: Label above the player's hand of cards.

hand.dealer.description: Label above the dealer's hand of cards.

hand.value.description: Displays the numeric value of a hand.

hand.valueHidden.description: Shown when dealer's hand value is hidden (hole card concealed).

card.accessibilityLabel.description: Screen reader label for a visible playing card.
card.accessibilityLabel.notes: rank and suit are interpolated; suit uses card.suit.* keys.

card.faceDown.description: Screen reader label for a face-down card.

card.suit.spades.description: Name of the Spades suit for screen reader use.

card.suit.hearts.description: Name of the Hearts suit for screen reader use.

card.suit.diamonds.description: Name of the Diamonds suit for screen reader use.

card.suit.clubs.description: Name of the Clubs suit for screen reader use.

outcome.blackjack.description: Result banner when player gets a natural blackjack.

outcome.push.description: Result banner when the hand is a tie (push).

payout.positive.description: Payout display when player wins chips (positive).
payout.positive.notes: Leading + sign should be preserved if possible.

payout.negative.description: Payout display when player loses chips (negative). amount is already negative.

payout.zero.description: Payout display for a push (no chips exchanged).

payout.accessibilityLabel.description: Screen reader label for the payout value.

phase.betting.description: Phase indicator shown to the player during the betting phase.

phase.player.description: Phase indicator shown during the player's turn.

phase.result.description: Phase indicator shown after the round is resolved.

gameOver.title.description: Title of the game-over modal when the player runs out of chips.

gameOver.body.description: Body text of the game-over modal.

gameOver.playAgain.description: Button to start a new session from the game-over modal.

gameOver.playAgainLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Play Again button.

gameOver.home.description: Button to return to the home screen from the game-over modal.

gameOver.homeLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Home button in the game-over modal.
